text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #2)

It been failing since 0.67.0 (bug #244725) .  I've not been in a position to look in depth at it.

Originally it was failing on both 13.0-CURRENT amd64 and i386, but it was fixed  a while ago on amd64 (since around bug #244963).
